business.name: Jacksonville Electrical Contractors
business.tagline: Every wire, every outlet, every problem — handled right

hero.headline: The *electrical crew* Jacksonville calls first
hero.subheadline: Masks on, safety first, work done clean. That's just how we show up to every job in this city.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every electrical job, handled right
services_section.subheading: From old house rewiring to simple switch repairs — we check everything, fix what needs fixing

services.title: Electrical Safety Testing
services.description: Full system checks for older homes. We find the problems before they find you, test everything twice.

services.title: Switch & Outlet Repair
services.description: Cracked bathroom switches, dead outlets, wonky wiring. We spot the issues and fix them clean.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old electrical panels that can't handle modern loads. We upgrade the whole system to current code.

services.title: House Rewiring
services.description: Complete electrical overhauls for older Jacksonville homes. Safe, neat work that passes inspection.

about.heading: Straight talk about electrical work
about.body: We're the electrical contractors Jacksonville homeowners call when safety matters. Every job gets the same treatment — masks on, tools ready, work done clean and to code. From Riverside to Mandarin, we've been keeping the lights on and the power flowing safely.

reviews.name: Sonja C.
reviews.text: They showed up wearing masks and made my older home so much safer. Professional work, neat installation, would definitely use again.

reviews.name: Lynn L.
reviews.text: Levi was incredibly knowledgeable and went the extra mile — even replaced a cracked bathroom switch he discovered. Really cares about the work.

reviews.name: Catherine B.
reviews.text: Two guys came out, super efficient and friendly. Knew exactly what was needed and finished in under 30 minutes. Great job!

reviews.name: Stas
reviews.text: Fair pricing, great work. Would recommend and use them again without hesitation.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Jacksonville and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Duval County

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work handled right?
cta.body: Free estimates, fast response, clean work. Call Jacksonville's trusted electrical contractors today.
